description: SCHC whole-packet compression vectors (RFC 8724). 'packet' is the full uncompressed IPv6 datagram; 'compressed' is compress_packet(packet). Round-trip: compress(packet) == compressed and decompress(compressed) == packet. Includes UDP and ICMPv6 malformed cases for cross-layer testing per RFC 4443 (bad checksum, truncated, length mismatch, invalid multicast source address, bad type).

vectors.name: udp_truncated
vectors.provenance: RFC 768 §3.1: UDP header is 8 bytes minimum. Mirrors ICMPv6 too-short handling (project-LICHEN-2auf.41.2.3.1.1).

vectors.name: udp_bad_checksum
vectors.provenance: RFC 8200 §8.1, RFC 4443 §2.3: invalid UDP checksum must drop silently. Mirrors bad ICMPv6 checksum.

vectors.name: udp_length_mismatch
vectors.provenance: RFC 768: length field must match datagram size. Mirrors ICMPv6 length validation.

vectors.name: icmpv6_invalid_source_multicast
vectors.provenance: RFC 4443 §2.4(e): ICMPv6 messages MUST NOT be sent with multicast source address (ff02::1); silently discarded by handle_icmpv6 and Icmpv6EchoProfile._is_link_local check. Independent oracle.

vectors.name: icmpv6_bad_type
vectors.provenance: RFC 4443 §2.3 and §3: unrecognized ICMPv6 type (99) is silently discarded; no matching SCHC profile (not echo 128/129 or RPL 155). Independent oracle.
